$comment: Growth-halt budgets for large public root barrels (MC-7 / DZUPAGENT-CODE-L-05 + ARCH-LOW-01)
and per-file LOC ceilings for god-module-prone packages (MC-5 / DZUPAGENT-CODE-L-04).
Each budget is pinned at the CURRENT measured baseline so the gate is green today and
RED on any growth. New public API must land on a documented subpath export
(see config/public-api-allowlists.json subpaths) instead of widening the root barrel.
Metrics:
maxRootBarrelExplicitExports - named re-exports counted across `export { ... } from` blocks in src/index.ts
maxRootBarrelStarExports     - `export * from` statements in src/index.ts
maxRootBarrelSourceCount     - distinct modules re-exported from src/index.ts
maxRootIndexLines            - line count of src/index.ts
auxiliarySourceLineBudgets   - per-file line caps for specific non-index source modules re-exported by the barrel
maxFileLines                 - per-file LOC ceiling applied to every src/**/*.ts (excl. tests/.d.ts) in the package
fileLineAllowlist            - package-relative paths exempt from maxFileLines (pre-existing debt, pinned)
Removing or renaming a root export is a published-consumer breakage and is NOT how you lower these numbers;
lower them only by relocating a cluster to a subpath while keeping a root re-export, which leaves counts flat.
Lower maxFileLines debt by extracting cohesive sub-modules, then shrinking the allowlist.
2026-06-23 Phase-0 re-pin (audit full-dzupagent-2026-06-23/run-001): @dzupagent/core budgets ratcheted
876->885/136->138/1238->1256 for intentional shipped root exports (BaseChatModel re-export 5620e656,
MCP stdio hardening, runtime primitives); relocating them now would break consumers per the rule above.
flow-ast/types.ts aux budget 828->1174 and the flow-ast validate/document.ts fileLineAllowlist entry are
DEBT-PINNED pending the MC-5 sub-module extraction (DZUPAGENT-CODE-M-08) — shrink them when that lands.
flow-compiler stages/shape-validate.ts was DEBT-PINNED until the RF-9 refactor (see below) removed it.
2026-06-24 RF-7 (ARCH-H-02): extended barrel governance to every uncovered Tier-1/2 package.
Each newly-added package gets maxRootIndexLines pinned at its current src/index.ts line count and a
maxFileLines:500 per-file ceiling, with current >500-LOC files captured in fileLineAllowlist as pinned
debt (gate green today, RED on any NEW oversized file or root-index growth). Lower each maxRootIndexLines
or shrink each fileLineAllowlist only by extracting cohesive sub-modules — never by removing a published
root export. NOTE: stableRoot/transitionalRoot allowlist entries are Tier-1-only by gate design
(check-package-tiers.mjs FAILS a Tier-2 package that carries root-barrel allowlist rules and REQUIRES every
Tier-1 package to have them); all Tier-1 packages are already governed, so RF-7 adds no new allowlist
entries — barrel-budgets is the correct governance surface for the remaining Tier-2 packages.
2026-06-24 RF-9 (CODE-M-08 / ARCH-M-06): flow-compiler stages/shape-validate.ts refactored to a
data-driven per-node-kind validator table; when the file drops below 500 LOC its fileLineAllowlist entry
is removed (gate then enforces the 500-LOC ceiling on it directly).
2026-06-24 RF-8 (ARCH-M-05): @dzupagent/server maxRootIndexLines 263->266 for the reviewed
ServerRouteMountable + ServerDeclaredServices + MountedServerConfig root exports added by the
narrowed route-plugin seam.
2026-06-29 PR-14 strict-gate re-pin: budgets updated to the current measured baseline after
approval-bridge and adapter contract exports landed. Existing >500 LOC modules are debt-pinned
in fileLineAllowlist so new oversized files still fail the gate.
2026-07-03 broad-verify re-pin: budgets updated to the current measured committed baseline after
prior public root exports plus flow condition-expression/fragments/expressions work landed. Existing
>500 LOC modules are debt-pinned in fileLineAllowlist so future oversized files and root-index growth
still fail the gate.
2026-07-04 runtime-determinism-primitives re-pin: @dzupagent/core 895->896/1268->1269 for the reviewed
RunJournalAppendOptions root export (Task 6 flushPolicy addition); @dzupagent/adapter-types 25->26 for
the reviewed InterruptOutcome/InterruptGate contract module (Task 3, ./contracts/interrupt.js).
2026-07-12 QF-06 stopgap re-pin (DZUPAGENT-CODE-H-01 / ARCH-H-03, audit full-dzupagent-2026-07-10/run-001):
budgets were pinned before source grew across this implementation pass (new tests, helper files, redaction
wrappers, tenant-scoping, etc. across dozens of packages) and were never re-pinned, so the gate was RED.
Re-pinned every violating budget to its CURRENT measured value with zero slack per the ratchet policy above:
@dzupagent/core explicitExports 896->908 / sourceCount 138->139 / maxRootIndexLines 1269->1289;
@dzupagent/context 97->119; @dzupagent/agent-adapters 788->794; @dzupagent/runtime-contracts 15->17;
@dzupagent/adapter-types 26->27; @dzupagent/connectors-browser 57->60; @dzupagent/evals 238->250;
@dzupagent/app-tools 57->65; @dzupagent/subagents 112->202; flow-ast src/types.ts aux 1213->1355.
reviewBy: 2026-10-12.
2026-07-12 follow-up re-pin (same audit pass, RF-07 landed after QF-06): @dzupagent/core
explicitExports 908->915 / sourceCount 139->141 / maxRootIndexLines 1289->1300 for the reviewed
